title: Cherry to Sakura
description: Renames all cherry wood items, biomes, and entities to Sakura (Japanese for Cherry Blossoms, of which the tree is named after).
body:
Renames Cherry Wood items, blocks, biomes, and entities to "Sakura".
This is a language-only change just to rename the wood type and all relevant data. There are no visual changes.

Sakura is the Japanese word for Cherry Blossoms, after which the tree is modeled.

This change is applied to the following versions of English:
- `English (US)` [en_us]
- `English (Australia)` [en_au]
- `English (Canada)` [en_ca]
- `English (United Kingdom)` [en_gb]
- `English (New Zealand)` [en_nz]
- `Pirate Speak (The Seven Seas) ` [en_pt]
- `ɥsᴉlƃuƎ (uʍop ǝpᴉsd∩)` [en_ud]
- `Anglish (Oned Riches)` [enp]
  - Renames `Stoneberry` to `Sakura` instead
- `Shakespearean English (Kingdom of England)` [enws]
  - Renames `Stoneberrywood` to `Sakurawood`. Stoneberry is only used for the biome.
  - The rest of the language uses Sakura instead of Cherry. 

Note: `LOLCAT (Kingdom of Cats)` [lol_us] has been skipped as it already uses the term Sakura over the term Cherry.
